Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-21717 affecting package nodejs24 for versions less than 24.14.1-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-21717 affecting package nodejs24 for versions less than 24.14.1-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package nodejs24 is earlier than 24.14.1-1, affected by CVE-2026-21717
